title: POC weekly sync: onboarding & quantization sprint
preview: Weekly POC check-in focused on closing staging access gaps and validating quantized model performance. Customer needs SSO/KMS integration and VPC peering for Private deployment trial. Team agreed to run a targeted shadow benchmark and to exchange security artifacts. Some tuning suggested for KV cache sizing and batc...
text: Weekly POC check-in focused on closing staging access gaps and validating quantized model performance. Customer needs SSO/KMS integration and VPC peering for Private deployment trial. Team agreed to run a targeted shadow benchmark and to exchange security artifacts. Some tuning suggested for KV cache sizing and batching policy to hit tail-latency SLOs.

title: 2026-06-10-sprint5-pilot-stabilization-and-decision-tollgate
preview: Sprint 5 check-in to review KPI progress, surface remaining stability issues, and formalize the go/no-go decision process. Main concerns: tail-latency spikes during burst tests, KV cache warm-up time, and SSO/KMS validation. Team agreed on an A/B canary starting with 5% traffic and gating on 99th percentile latency,...
text: Sprint 5 check-in to review KPI progress, surface remaining stability issues, and formalize the go/no-go decision process. Main concerns: tail-latency spikes during burst tests, KV cache warm-up time, and SSO/KMS validation. Team agreed on an A/B canary starting with 5% traffic and gating on 99th percentile latency, error rate, and token-cost budget. Action owners assigned and a decision meeting scheduled.

title: Selection Sprint: Catalog + Bench Review
preview: Walkthrough of the Redwood model catalog, bench interpretation, and a compatibility matrix approach for selecting open models for NimbleHealth's clinical summarization pipeline. Agreed next steps around a short pilot, benchmark spreadsheet, and a kernel mapping session.
text: Walkthrough of the Redwood model catalog, bench interpretation, and a compatibility matrix approach for selecting open models for NimbleHealth's clinical summarization pipeline. Agreed next steps around a short pilot, benchmark spreadsheet, and a kernel mapping session.

text:
Meeting header:
Date: 2025-02-11
Start: 15:30 UTC
Duration: ~58 minutes
Location: Zoom
Recording: yes

Attendees: Alex (Redwood AE), Jordan (Redwood SE), Samira (Product), Ethan (SRE) — Priya (NimbleHealth ML), Marcus (Infra), Lena (Head AI)

Auto-summary (auto gen, may be rough):
- Deep dive on quantization options (INT8 / FP8 / GPTQ / AWQ) and how they map to accuracy/latency tradeoffs for NimbleHealth clinical prompts.
- Discussed KV cache interactions, batching, and on-prem VPC constraints.
- Agreed on next steps: share micro-benchmarks, customer to send prompt corpus, schedule repro session.

Topics: quantization accuracy regressions, calibration data, batch sizing, prefix caching, VPC KMS rules, fallback strategies.
